methodology.new_hypothesis_gate: Run/repair existing pending links first. Add new hypotheses only where linked coverage remains below the selected floor after pending runs are exhausted.
methodology.non_action: This queue does not change scores or verdicts; it only prioritizes work.
methodology.principle: Rank already-linked pending hypotheses by coverage unlocked for under-covered schools.
methodology.score: For each under-covered school helped: 1 + tested_gap/selected_tested_floor. One hypothesis can help multiple schools.
